summary: Transmigrated protagonist receives hidden game-breaking system only upon achieving specific status threshold—mechanic establishes earned-access narrative where advantage arrives after initial vulnerability.
promotion_target: Any hidden-advantage power-fantasy where reader knowledge creates dramatic irony

summary: System mechanics delivered through transparent in-world interface (status panels, quest trackers, notification flashes) rather than narrator exposition—maintains immersion while explaining rules diegetically.
promotion_target: Any genre employing hidden systems, game mechanics, or magic with learnable rules

summary: Protagonist enters world significantly weaker than all antagonists with insufficient resources for stated task—reader investment built on systematic competence gain through hidden advantages.
promotion_target: Underdog power-fantasy, progression fantasy, any story where competence increase is primary satisfaction

summary: Core mechanics taught through sequential quest stages (collect_object → interact_landmark → execute_ownership_ritual) using checklist framing to simulate game UI cadence—transforms tutorial into interactive payoff.
promotion_target: Game-world transmigration, system-interface fiction, any world where mechanical rules must be established efficiently

summary: Ownership/binding mechanics employ tactile sensory specificity (fluid release, spiritual connection sensation, energy propagation visualization)—ritual payoff rendered physical rather than abstract.
promotion_target: Any magic system requiring ceremony, binding, or ownership mechanics

summary: External rival publicly humiliates protagonist during early scene to establish insurmountable power imbalance without extended exposition—antagonist cruelty delivers world-state information diegetically.
promotion_target: Any underdog story requiring immediate threat establishment

summary: Ownership/control confirmed through system-rendered visualization (energy spreading from claimed landmark)—stakes made visible rather than stated, creating diegetic payoff moment.
promotion_target: Any faction-building, territory-claim, or organizational establishment narrative

summary: Character status display shows unestablished slots as placeholder markers—constructive anticipation created by visible empty spaces that reader wants protagonist to fill.
promotion_target: Progression fantasy, collection mechanics, any story with upgrade/recruitment/development systems
